# InstallApplicationCommand.Command.Configuration

**Device Management Command**

A dictionary that contains the configuration to install an enterprise app.

## Declaration

```swift
object InstallApplicationCommand.Command.Configuration
```

## Objects

- **InstallApplicationCommand.Command.Attributes**: A dictionary that contains the initial attributes of the app.
- **InstallApplicationCommand.Command.Options**: A dictionary that contains the app installation options.
